column3: For use with the Russian Cyrillic Keyboard Layout
Replaces two letters with handwritten glyphs of Greek letters.
Fails dictionary searches and is intended for aesthetic purposes.
Has to be case sensitive with the (C) syntax
Probably has to have the (?) syntax, which will allow it to trigger within words.

column1: *C?OZ‖л‖SI‖En‖{U+1D27}‖greek letter small capital lamda - Automatic Replace
